R Notebook

This is an R Markdown Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code.

Try executing this chunk by clicking the Run button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing Cmd+Shift+Enter.

require(tidyverse)
require(RCurl)

Loading required package: RCurl
Loading required package: bitops

Attaching package: ‘RCurl’

The following object is masked from ‘package:tidyr’:

    complete
require(readxl)
lan2 <- as.data.frame(lan2)
for(i in 8:ncol(lan2)) lan2[,i] <- as.numeric(lan2[,i])
lan2 <- as.tibble(lan2)
lan2 %>% count(SubDistrict)
# A tibble: 5,924 x 2
   SubDistrict     n
   <chr>       <int>
 1 00000       82092
 2 00001         106
 3 00002          96
 4 00003          81
 5 00004          16
 6 00005          59
 7 00006          36
 8 00007          75
 9 00008          74
10 00009          15
# ... with 5,914 more rows
lan2 <- lan2 %>% mutate(Major=(grepl('\\d+',language) & !grepl('Others', language)))
head(lan2) %>% group_by(Area)
langMajor <- lan2 %>%  filter(Major)
langMinor <- lan2 %>% filter(!Major)
langMajor %>% filter(SubDistrict != '00000') %>% group_by(Area) %>% summarise(Total=sum(Total_P)) %>% arrange(-Total) %>% group_by(Area)
areas <- langMajor %>% group_by(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, Area) %>% summarise(TotalUrban=sum(Urban_P), TotalRural=sum(Rural_P)) %>% ungroup()
Warning messages:
1: Unknown or uninitialised column: 'Metro'. 
2: Unknown or uninitialised column: 'Metro'. 
3: Unknown or uninitialised column: 'Metro'. 
4: Unknown or uninitialised column: 'Metro'. 
5: Unknown or uninitialised column: 'Metro'. 
head(areas)
# A tibble: 6 x 6
  State_code District_code SubDistrict Area            TotalUrban TotalRural
  <chr>      <chr>         <chr>       <chr>                <dbl>      <dbl>
1 01         000           00000       JAMMU & KASHMIR    3433242    9108060
2 01         001           00000       Kupwara             104729     765625
3 01         001           00001       Kupwara              75591     465323
4 01         001           00002       Handwara             13600     255711
5 01         001           00003       Karnah               15538      44591
6 01         002           00000       Badgam               97912     655833
areas %>% filter(TotalRural==0) %>% arrange(-TotalUrban) %>% distinct(TotalUrban, .keep_all=T) %>% group_by(TotalUrban)
areas <- areas %>% left_join(areas %>% filter(SubDistrict=='00000') %>% select(District_code, TopArea=Area), by='District_code') %>% mutate(Area=ifelse(SubDistrict=='99999', TopArea, Area)) %>% select(-TopArea) %>% distinct()  %>% ungroup()
cities <- areas %>% filter(TotalUrban>1e5 & TotalUrban/(TotalUrban+TotalRural) > 0.9) %>% arrange(-(TotalUrban)) %>% distinct(Area, .keep_all=T)
cities <- cities %>% 
  left_join(cities %>% filter(District_code=='000') %>% select(State_code) %>% mutate(fullState=T)) %>% 
  filter(is.na(fullState) | District_code=='000') %>% 
  left_join(cities %>% filter(District_code!='000' & SubDistrict=='00000') %>% select(District_code) %>% mutate(fullDistrict=T)) %>% 
  filter(is.na(fullDistrict) | SubDistrict=='00000')
Joining, by = "State_code"
Joining, by = "District_code"
  
cities %>% arrange(State_code) %>% group_by(Area) %>% arrange(-TotalUrban)
cities <- cities %>% mutate(Signature=paste(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, sep='_'))
langMajor <- langMajor %>% mutate(Signature=paste(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, sep='_'))
langMinor <- langMinor %>% mutate(Signature=paste(State_code, District_code, SubDistrict, sep='_'))
cityLangMajor <- cities %>% 
  select(Area, Signature) %>% 
  left_join(langMajor %>% select(Signature, language, Urban_P), by='Signature') %>%
  group_by(Area, language) %>% 
  summarise(Total=sum(Urban_P)) %>% 
  arrange(Area, -Total) %>%
  mutate(language=gsub('[^A-Za-z]', '', language))
head(cityLangMajor)
cityLangMinor <- cities %>% 
  select(Area, Signature) %>% 
  left_join(langMinor %>% select(Signature, language, Urban_P), by='Signature') %>%
  group_by(Area, language) %>% 
  summarise(Total=sum(Urban_P)) %>% 
  arrange(Area, -Total) %>%
  mutate(language=gsub('[^A-Za-z]', '', language))
head(cityLangMinor)
cityDiversity <- cityLangMajor %>% 
  group_by(Area) %>% 
  mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total)) %>% 
  summarise(MajorHHI=sum(Share*Share), NumMajor=1/MajorHHI) %>% 
  left_join(
    cityLangMinor %>% 
      group_by(Area) %>% 
      mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total)) %>% 
      summarise(MinorHHI=sum(Share*Share), NumMinor=1/MinorHHI),
    by='Area'
  ) %>% 
  left_join(cities %>% select(Area, Population=TotalUrban)) %>%
  arrange(-NumMajor, -NumMinor) 
Joining, by = "Area"
  
cityDiversity
# A tibble: 95 x 6
   Area                 MajorHHI NumMajor MinorHHI NumMinor Population
   <chr>                   <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>      <dbl>
 1 Kohima Sadar            0.164     6.09    0.130     7.67     114773
 2 Mumbai                  0.235     4.25    0.216     4.63    3085411
 3 Mumbai Suburban         0.239     4.19    0.216     4.63    9356962
 4 Bangalore               0.246     4.07    0.245     4.08    8749944
 5 Golmuri-Cum-Jugsalai    0.268     3.74    0.158     6.31    1157578
 6 Ulhasnagar              0.272     3.68    0.251     3.98     506098
 7 Thane                   0.285     3.51    0.256     3.90    3771413
 8 Darjiling               0.304     3.29    0.279     3.58     516713
 9 Raurkela (M)            0.321     3.12    0.266     3.76     320040
10 Vasai                   0.331     3.02    0.299     3.34    1230140
# ... with 85 more rows
cityLangMajorList <- cityLangMajor %>% 
  group_by(Area) %>% 
  arrange(-Total) %>%
  mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total), cumulShare=cumsum(Share)) %>% 
  filter(cumulShare-Share <= 0.9) %>%
  mutate(Sign=paste(language, ': ', round(Share*100), '%', sep='')) %>%
  summarise(TopLang=paste(Sign, collapse=', '), Population=sum(Total)) %>%
  arrange(-Population)
cityLangMinorList <- cityLangMinor %>% 
  group_by(Area) %>% 
  filter(!grepl('Others', language)) %>%
  arrange(-Total) %>%
  mutate(Share=Total/sum(Total), cumulShare=cumsum(Share)) %>% 
  filter(cumulShare-Share <= 0.8) %>%
  mutate(Sign=paste(language, ': ', round(Share*100), '%', sep='')) %>%
  summarise(TopLang=paste(Sign, collapse=', '), Population=sum(Total)) %>%
  arrange(-Population)
cityLangMajorList 
# A tibble: 95 x 3
   Area                       TopLang                                             Population
   <chr>                      <chr>                                                    <dbl>
 1 NCT OF DELHI               HINDI: 85%, PUNJABI: 5%, URDU: 5%                     15587128
 2 Mumbai Suburban            MARATHI: 35%, HINDI: 30%, GUJARATI: 12%, URDU: 11%…    8552737
 3 Bangalore                  KANNADA: 42%, TAMIL: 16%, TELUGU: 14%, URDU: 13%, …    7949715
 4 Ahmadabad City             GUJARATI: 68%, HINDI: 22%                              5042870
 5 North Twenty Four Parganas BENGALI: 79%, HINDI: 15%                               4713065
 6 Kolkata                    BENGALI: 61%, HINDI: 23%, URDU: 13%                    4376662
 7 Chennai                    TAMIL: 78%, TELUGU: 9%, URDU: 4%                       4271189
 8 Surat City                 GUJARATI: 55%, HINDI: 26%, MARATHI: 10%                4067334
 9 Hyderabad                  TELUGU: 43%, URDU: 43%, HINDI: 7%                      3705442
10 Thane                      MARATHI: 44%, HINDI: 28%, URDU: 9%, GUJARATI: 6%, …    3409107
# ... with 85 more rows
cityLangMinorList
# A tibble: 95 x 3
   Area                       TopLang                                             Population
   <chr>                      <chr>                                                    <dbl>
 1 NCT OF DELHI               Hindi: 81%, Punjabi: 5%, Urdu: 5%                     15006421
 2 Mumbai Suburban            Marathi: 35%, Hindi: 25%, Gujarati: 12%, Urdu: 11%…    8468106
 3 Bangalore                  Kannada: 42%, Tamil: 16%, Telugu: 14%, Urdu: 13%, …    7862925
 4 Ahmadabad City             Gujarati: 68%, Hindi: 20%, Urdu: 4%                    5103703
 5 North Twenty Four Parganas Bengali: 79%, Hindi: 15%                               4694530
 6 Kolkata                    Bengali: 61%, Hindi: 22%, Urdu: 13%                    4347397
 7 Chennai                    Tamil: 78%, Telugu: 9%, Urdu: 4%                       4271110
 8 Surat City                 Gujarati: 55%, Hindi: 23%, Marathi: 10%, Urdu: 3%      4045280
 9 Hyderabad                  Telugu: 43%, Urdu: 43%, Hindi: 6%                      3645318
10 Thane                      Marathi: 44%, Hindi: 23%, Urdu: 9%, Gujarati: 6%, …    3426735
# ... with 85 more rows
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-NumMajor) %>%
  write_delim(pipe('pbcopy'), delim='\t')
  
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, NumMinor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMinorList %>% select(Area, TopDialects=TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-NumMinor) %>%
  write_delim(pipe('pbcopy'), delim='\t')
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, NumMinor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMinorList %>% select(Area, TopDialects=TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-Population) %>%
  write_delim(pipe('pbcopy'), delim='\t')
cityDiversity %>% 
  select(Area, NumMajor, NumMinor, Population) %>%
  left_join(cityLangMinorList %>% select(Area, TopDialects=TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  left_join(cityLangMajorList %>% select(Area, TopLang), by='Area') %>%
  arrange(-Population) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Population, y=NumMajor, label=Area)) + geom_point() + geom_text()  + geom_smooth(method='lm')
